semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the DocumentationRenderer component in the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Sets up isolated temporary directories for each test case to avoid side effects.
Validates that DocumentationRenderer.render produces correct English and localized output structure.
Tests the renderExtraSections and renderStructureList helper functions for proper formatting.
Ensures test cleanup restores original working directory and removes temporary artifacts.
outOfScope: File system operations outside test isolation.
Integration testing with other system components.
invariants: Must clean up temporary directories after each test.
Must not modify the source renderer implementation.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure DocumentationRenderer produces correct markdown output and handles localization as per ArchSpine's documentation generation requirements.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Restore LLM-authored markdown generation capabilities, likely updating tests to validate restored functionality.
